error.no_data: No data available for this channel

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the Volkszaehler server.
data_description.port: Port number of the Volkszaehler server.
data_description.uuid: UUID of the channel to monitor. In the Volkszaehler Web UI, click the (i) icon next to the channel to find it.

user.description: Enter your Volkszaehler server and first channel details.
user.title: Set up Volkszaehler

data_description.uuid: UUID of the channel to monitor. In the Volkszaehler Web UI, click the (i) icon next to the channel to find it.

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.description: Importing Volkszaehler sensor configuration from YAML failed because the server could not be reached. Remove the YAML configuration and set up the integration through the Home Assistant UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_cannot_conn.title: YAML import failed

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_no_data.description: Importing Volkszaehler sensor configuration from YAML failed because no data was available for the channel. Remove the YAML configuration and set up the integration through the Home Assistant UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_no_data.title: YAML import failed

deprecated_yaml_import_issue_unknown.description: Importing Volkszaehler sensor configuration from YAML is deprecated or failed. Remove the YAML configuration and set up the integration through the Home Assistant UI.
deprecated_yaml_import_issue_unknown.title: YAML import is deprecated
